title: ContentService.cancelSyncAsUser 缺少 hasAccountAccess/hasAuthorityAccess 权限检查
notes: cancelSyncAsUser() only checks enforceCrossUserPermission but NOT hasAccountAccess or hasAuthorityAccess. Compare with requestSync() at line 567 which does both checks. Any app can cancel sync for any account/authority belonging to other apps in the same user. Passing account=null,authority=null cancels ALL syncs for the user. This is a DoS vulnerability - attacker can prevent email/contacts/calendar sync.
